MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-29-2014 IN 206, DEFENDANT JANESSA LEANE TREVETHAN'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. SONIA MERIDA APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. NO OPPOSITION FILED. AFTER FINDING GOOD CAUSE BASED ON THE DECLARATION OF COUNSEL, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/23/14 IS CONTINUED TO 10/27/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MINI MINUTES: No Appearances, The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JANESSA TREVETHAN Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents is Continued to October 21, 2014 to give the parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the reply papers and opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 14, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f).
